chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-193 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For orders on CMA No.904/2022 3. For orders on CMA No.5593/2022 4. For hearing of main case 02-11-2023 Mr. Muhammad Sadiq Ansari, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Rehan Khan Durrani, Advocate for Respondents No.3 to 5 Mr. Ashfaque Ahmed Abro, Deputy Attorney General Muhammad Nasim Khan AM(HR & Admin) and Muhammad Kashif SDO (Civil) NTDC.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition has been filed by petitioner for up gradation of his post from BPS-5 to BPS 9. However, meanwhile he has been removed from the service on charges of misconduct vide order dated 11.10.2021. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has been removed from the service without observing all codal formalities and affording him a proper opportunity of hearing, therefore he does not press this petition but would file a fresh petition against his removal on various grounds including the one as highlighted above. In view of above, this petition is dismissed as not pressed in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
